help.ui_language: Choose UI language. New locales are detected automatically from “resources/locales”.
help.theme: Changes UI theme. Styling will ultimately be controlled via QSS.
help.device: Select device for ASR inference. “GPU” uses CUDA if available (NVIDIA only).
help.precision_hint: Precision affects performance and memory usage.

precision.auto: Let the app choose the best precision for your device.
precision.float32: Best quality and compatibility. Recommended on CPU.
precision.float16: Faster and uses less VRAM on CUDA. May slightly reduce accuracy.
precision.bfloat16: Similar to FP16 but available only on some GPUs. Often more stable than FP16.

help.tf32: TF32 is a fast matrix mode on newer NVIDIA GPUs (Ampere+). It speeds up computation with minimal quality impact.
help.model_name: Select a local model folder from “resources/models”. A restart is required to fully reload the pipeline.
help.default_language: Optional transcription language hint (e.g. “en”, “pl”). Empty = auto-detect.
help.chunk_length: Audio chunk length for the pipeline (seconds). Larger values can be faster but use more memory.
help.stride_length: Chunk overlap (seconds). More overlap improves continuity but increases load.
help.low_cpu_mem_usage: Reduces RAM usage during model loading (recommended).
help.output_format: Defines file extension and whether timestamps are included.
help.keep_downloaded_files: Keep downloaded temp files for URL sources. Disable to save disk space.
help.keep_wav_temp: Keep temporary WAV files created during preprocessing (useful for debugging).
help.download_audio_only: When transcribing URLs, download audio only instead of full video when possible.
help.retries: How many times to retry failed HTTP requests.
help.concurrent_fragments: Concurrent fragment downloads. Higher can be faster but stresses the connection.

license.summary: This program is free software distributed under the GNU General Public License version 3 (GPL-3.0).
license.full_link: Full license text is available in LICENSE shipped with the application.
